Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ach'magut]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Ach'magut is a figure whose worship the Greenwardens were meant to counteract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Ach’magut seeks knowledge at any cost.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Ach’magut is the Overseer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Ach’magut is the Father of Knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Ach’magut is the Lord of a Thousand Eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Ach’magut is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Ach’magut is a being that has a library.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Ach’magut is a figure Kelarac has spoken with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Ach’magut is a dead lord whose followers are Inquisitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Ach’magut is an entity or force that feasts on the collected knowledge of humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Ach’magut is praised for sending new brothers and sisters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder listened to Ach’magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Ach’magut might call Shera a deviation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Ach’magut has Inquisitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Ach’magut is an oppressive presence felt by Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Ach’magut is a Great Elder rumored to be imprisoned beneath Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut is an Elder sealed underneath Silverreach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut is a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut has a single eye that is human in shape but larger than Calder's head, with a hypnotic, poisonous blue iris.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut's existence is a mass of limbs, eyes, tendrils, ears, and appendages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut's existence is a world unto itself and an ancient dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut has tentacles that analyze emotions, pasts, and physical compositions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut allowed an alteration to his grand cosmic plan centuries ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut can read potential paths of choices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut's predictions of the future are factually correct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut communicates through a language of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut has one giant eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Ach’magut provides recommendations for heirs.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut is a parasite that leeches onto worlds to learn everything he can before moving on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut is not above taking things apart to see how they work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut will not be finished with the world for another ten thousand years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut likes to deconstruct every speck of data.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Ach'magut is the Overseer, whereas Nakothi is the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Ach'magut wants the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Ach'magut is not Tharlos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Ach'magut possesses an eternal appetite that can never be sated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Ach'magut is a Great Elder whose spawn are the spider-like Inquisitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Ach'magut began to stir in the town of Silverreach four years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Ach'magut refers to the Emperor as a former slave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Ach'magut communicates via direct injections of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Ach'magut views the world as a game board and people as game pieces.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Ach'magut has a prophecy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Ach'magut has a plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Ach’magut gave Calder an image of himself wearing the Emperor's gold crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Ach'magut promised Calder would be addressed as the Emperor of the World.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder has felt the force of will projected by Ach’magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Ach’magut possesses infinite knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Ach’magut is an Elder who may have made a prophecy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Ach’magut previously told Calder he would rule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Ach’magut let Calder and Kelarac leave their presence with knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Ach’magut planned the creation of the crack in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Emperor dealt with Ach’magut a few years ago.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Ach’magut is a character mentioned by Esty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Am’haranai once took contracts from Ach’magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Ach’magut’s prophecy called Shera 'the Killer'.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
